description_long: This is an ornate funerary monument featuring a recumbent human figure, likely an angel or a saint, lying on a raised platform with a pillow under the head. The figure is carved in white stone and is surrounded by a dark, rectangular architectural frame with gold decorative accents and a black base. Above the figure, there is a plaque with inscriptions, flanked by columns and topped with a sculpted crest and a cherubic face. The monument is set against a stone wall, with intricate details in the relief work and a sense of solemnity and reverence. The craftsmanship suggests a historical or religious significance, with careful attention to drapery, facial features, and ornamental motifs.
description: A detailed funerary monument with a reclining white stone figure on a dark, ornate base, framed by columns, gold accents, and a sculpted crest above.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full recumbent figure, the inscribed plaque, gold accents, and the decorative crest above, providing the most complete visual of the monument.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the monument, the thickness of the base, and the profile of the reclining figure.
description_view_2: The rear view is a plain, flat black surface with no visible sculptural or decorative elements.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the side profile of the figure and the monument's layered structure, including the base and columns.
attribute_subject_matter: recumbent human figure on a funerary monument
attribute_location_context: The monument is installed against an interior stone wall, likely in a historical or religious building such as a church or cathedral.
